synopsis:
The twenty-sixth issue of the Marvel Comics Darth Vader (2020) Series
We all know about Anakin Skywalker's aversion to finely ground particulate matter.But what does sand mean to the Dark Lord of the Sith?When Sabé, Vader's unlikely new ally, goes missing, Vader must confront his own dark heart in the maelstrom of a terrible sandstorm – while tapping into one of his earliest skills in a wildly unexpected way!
title: Darth Vader (2020) #26
